title: Your Apps
bodyHtml:
You have four apps in your locker:

AppWhat it does
📋 To-doMake lists, check things off, set due dates
📝 NotesJot down anything — study notes, reminders, ideas
⏱ TimerBasic countdown or Pomodoro mode for focused study
📌 PinsPinned web links to your most-used sites

Opening an app

On a computer: active apps are always visible side-by-side as panes. Use the small icon buttons in the toolbar at the top to toggle apps on and off. You can have up to 3 apps active at once.

On your phone: swipe left and right to move between apps. All four apps are always available — no toggling needed.

Inside an app

Most apps hold multiple items — for example, the To-do app can hold many lists. When you open an app, you'll see your items listed. Tap one to open it. Hit the back arrow to return to the list.

Your place is saved — switch apps and come back, you're right where you left off.

Rearranging your apps (desktop)

Drag a pane's header to swap it with another pane. Drag the divider between two panes to resize them. Each pane has buttons to maximize, restore, or close it.
description: Overview of the four locker apps: To-do, Notes, Timer, and Pins.
